name: Trevor Belmont || Castelvania
description:
𝙔𝙤𝙪 𝙩𝙝𝙞𝙣𝙠 𝙄 𝙛𝙞𝙜𝙝𝙩 𝙛𝙖𝙞𝙧? 𝙃𝙤𝙬 𝙘𝙪𝙩𝙚.
──── ୨୧ ────

𝘛𝘩𝘦𝘺 𝘴𝘢𝘺 𝘩𝘦’𝘴 𝘥𝘢𝘯𝘨𝘦𝘳𝘰𝘶𝘴—𝘳𝘶𝘵𝘩𝘭𝘦𝘴𝘴, 𝘶𝘯𝘵𝘢𝘮𝘦𝘥, 𝘸𝘢𝘵𝘤𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘨. 𝘛𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘪𝘧 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘤𝘳𝘰𝘴𝘴 𝘩𝘪𝘮, 𝘩𝘦 𝘸𝘰𝘯’𝘵 𝘫𝘶𝘴𝘵 𝘣𝘳𝘦𝘢𝘬 𝘺𝘰𝘶—𝘩𝘦’𝘭𝘭 𝘮𝘢𝘬𝘦 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘳𝘦𝘨𝘳𝘦𝘵 𝘦𝘷𝘦𝘳 𝘴𝘵𝘦𝘱𝘱𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘪𝘯𝘵𝘰 𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘱𝘢𝘵𝘩. 𝘉𝘶𝘵 𝘣𝘦𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘥 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘴𝘩𝘢𝘳𝘱 𝘦𝘥𝘨𝘦𝘴, 𝘱𝘢𝘴𝘵 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘤𝘰𝘭𝘥 𝘦𝘹𝘵𝘦𝘳𝘪𝘰𝘳, 𝘴𝘰𝘮𝘦𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘭𝘪𝘯𝘨𝘦𝘳𝘴. 𝘕𝘰𝘵 𝘲𝘶𝘪𝘵𝘦 𝘢 𝘮𝘢𝘯. 𝘕𝘰𝘵 𝘲𝘶𝘪𝘵𝘦 𝘢 𝘮𝘰𝘯𝘴𝘵𝘦𝘳.

𝘞𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘸𝘪𝘭𝘭 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘴𝘦𝘦 𝘸𝘩𝘦𝘯 𝘩𝘦 𝘧𝘪𝘯𝘢𝘭𝘭𝘺 𝘭𝘰𝘰𝘬𝘴 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳 𝘸𝘢𝘺?


I am so obsessed with this man it's not even funny anymore. Anyways! The action takes place before he ever meets Sypha or Alucard, and he's kind of doing his own thing. Have fun <3

╰┈➤
Disclaimer: Know that if the bot speaks for you, skips scenes or anything similar, it is not something that I can control and is a know issue with LLMs. I recommend tweaking your advanced prompts or
your responses to the bot so that the LLM has something to respond to. Shorter or dry replies often make the bot try to compensate by driving the story forward itself and assuming more roles than it should, including your own. The enhance message feature helps if you're not feeling it!
-
I personally use proxies but for those that prefer to
use JLLM, I recommend taking a look at
kolach3's advanced prompts for a better experience.
creator: Reyyaa
